title: Linking subitems
excerpt: i want to be able to link a Subitem to a group allowing for the group to contain all the tasks for a subitem, much like ths diagram attached

posts.author: rywilson (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml:
i want to be able to link a Subitem to a group allowing for the group to contain all the tasks for a subitem, much like ths diagram attached

image1612×1124 125 KB

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml: You probably need to get more specific. Describe a single item flowing through as you imagine.

posts.author: rywilson (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Using the image above, I would want to have it so that when all the sub items in the DD Design Meeting 1 group are completed then the sub item in the Project Schedule marks as complete.

posts.author: psperry (Accidental Selfie )
posts.cookedHtml:
I think the beginning of your solution is below. Let me know if you need any help.

Status cannot be set as done unless all subitems are set as done Platform discussions
Hi, I’m wondering if there is an automation that would require all subitems to be marked as done before the main item could be set as done. The idea is to stop something being accidentally set as done and give a misleading impression of what work is still to be completed.
